headline: Maryland Pricing Ban And BTS Tie Up Shape Walmart Outlook
summary: Maryland has become the first U.S. state to ban surveillance-based dynamic pricing in grocery retail, directly affecting Walmart and other large chains. The new rule restricts retailers from using individual consumer data to adjust in-store prices. At the same time, Walmart is launching the exclusive ARIH Western-Korean fusion food and beverage brand nationwide, in partnership with Paldo, hy, and BTS. Walmart is also expanding fresh and health-focused ranges, reinforcing its role as a key...
